FAQ Box

This is an interactive FAQ section for your course. You may change the questions and answers as needed.

How to use in Brightspace

  1. Go to Content in your course
  2. Select Create New → HTML Document
  3. Open Source (</>)
  4. Copy the HTML below and paste it

Preview

Course FAQ

Where do I submit assignments?

Submissions are located in Assignments. If you don’t see it yet, check the module release conditions.

How do I contact the instructor?

Use the Email Instructor button on the course homepage.

Why don’t I see future content?

Some items are released by date or completion requirements.

Instructions to add more drop-down boxes:

Copy and paste this after the </details> and before the </section> commands inside the Source Code editor "< >"

<details style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px;"> <summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600;">Why don’t I see future content?</summary> <p style="margin-top: 10px; color: #313131;">Some items are released by date or completion requirements.</p> </details>

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:



       <!DOCTYPE html>
<html><head><link rel="stylesheet" href="https://s.brightspace.com/lib/fonts/0.6.1/fonts.css" >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://templates.lcs.brightspace.com/lib/assets/css/styles.min.css">
    </head><body style="color: rgb(32, 33, 34); font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 12px;">
      <section aria-label="Course FAQ" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif;">
<h2 style="color: #cb4900;">Course FAQ</h2>
<details style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
<summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600;">Where do I submit assignments?</summary>
<p style="margin-top: 10px; color: #313131;">Submissions are located in <strong>Assignments</strong>. If you don’t see it yet, check the module release conditions.</p>
</details>
<details style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
<summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600;">How do I contact the instructor?</summary>
<p style="margin-top: 10px; color: #313131;">Use the <strong>Email Instructor</strong> button on the course homepage.</p>
</details>
<details style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px;">
<summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600;">Why don’t I see future content?</summary>
<p style="margin-top: 10px; color: #313131;">Some items are released by date or completion requirements.</p>
</details>
</section>
        
        



        
<h3>Instructions to add more drop-down boxes:</h3>
<p>Copy and paste this after the <strong>&lt;/details&gt; </strong>and before the <strong>&lt;/section&gt;</strong> commands inside the Source Code editor "&lt; &gt;"</p>
<p><code>

<details style="border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px;">
<summary style="cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600;">Why don’t I see future content?</summary>
<p style="margin-top: 10px; color: #313131;">Some items are released by date or completion requirements.</p>
</details>

</code>
</p>
</body>
</html>

← Back to catalog
